title: Textures for Brewery
description: The resource pack adds textures (hand-drawn) for the Brewery plugin
body:
RU:
Были перерисованы все напитки плагина Brewery (а именно: absinthe, apple_cider, apple_liquor, beer, coffee, darkbeer, eggnog, gin, golden_rum, green_absinthe, mead, mushroomvodka, potato_soup, red_wine, tequila, vodka, wheatbeer, whiskey).
Чтобы ресурспак работал БЕЗ оптифайна, необходим этот мод: [ https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn),
А так же советую отключить мод Eating Animation, так как при выпивании текстуры пропадут...

ENG:
All drinks of the Brewery plugin have been redrawn (exactly: absinthe, apple_cider, apple_liquor, beer, coffee, darkbeer, eggnog, gin, golden_rum, green_absinthe, mead, mushroomvodka, potato_soup, red_wine, tequila, vodka, wheatbeer, whiskey).
In order for the resource pack to work WITHOUT an optifine, you need this mod: [ https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn),
And I also advise you to disable the Eating Animation mod, since when drinking, the textures will disappear...

**NOTE!**
Some textures were taken from other games or were drawn using the template of other resource packs!
